{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Finance Manager",
  "description": "Brands Optimal Limited is one of Africa&rsquo;s leading Experiential Marketing Agency which optimizes value for client through the use of strategic, reliable and measurable method in consumer engagement, loyalty seeding and sales generation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Finance Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type:&nbsp;Full-time
Industry: Experiential Marketing

Job Summary
We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly organized Senior Finance Manager to join our Finance team:


	Financial Oversight: Manage end-to-end accounting operations, including general ledger, accounts payable/receivable, and payroll, bank reconciliations,
	Budgeting &amp; Forecasting: Lead the annual budgeting process and develop rolling financial forecasts to guide business strategy.
	Financial Reporting: Prepare and present monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements to the Head of department.
	Compliance &amp; Audit: Ensure adherence to accounting standards (GAAP/IFRS) and manage both internal and external audit processes.
	Business Partnering: Collaborate with other departments (Sales, Marketing, Operations) to align financial plans with organizational goals.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their Resume to:&nbsp;jobs@brandsoptimal.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email",

Senior Finance Manager Job at Brands Optimal Limited




        
    

        
        Brands Optimal Limited is one of Africa’s leading Experiential Marketing Agency which optimizes value for client through the use of strategic, reliable and measurable method in consumer engagement, loyalty seeding and sales generation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Finance Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Experiential Marketing

Job Summary
We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly organized Senior Finance Manager to join our Finance team:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Financial Oversight: Manage end-to-end accounting operations, including general ledger, accounts payable/receivable, and payroll, bank reconciliations,
	Budgeting & Forecasting: Lead the annual budgeting process and develop rolling financial forecasts to guide business strategy.
	Financial Reporting: Prepare and present monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements to the Head of department.
	Compliance & Audit: Ensure adherence to accounting standards (GAAP/IFRS) and manage both internal and external audit processes.
	Business Partnering: Collaborate with other departments (Sales, Marketing, Operations) to align financial plans with organizational goals.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Analyst - Digital Advertising Sales",
  "description": "MTN Nigeria - The leader in telecommunications in Nigeria, and a part of a diverse community in Africa and the Middle East, our brand is instantly recognisable. It is through our compelling brand that we are able to attract the right talents who we carefully nurture by continuously improving our employment offerings even beyond reward and recognition.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Analyst - Digital Advertising Sales

Job Identification: 7093
Job Location: Nigeria
Job Schedule: Full time
Job Category: MTN Level 3
Reports To: Manager - Digital Advertising Sales
Division:&nbsp;Digital Services

Mission


	Drive revenue growth for MTN Nigeria&rsquo;s Mobile Advertising products by providing sales teams with strong analytical, commercial, and proposal driven support.&nbsp;
	Create campaign solutions, discover new inventory opportunities, supports business development, manage advertiser onboarding, and helps retain and grow advertiser spend.


Description


	Track the progress of sales support activities, campaign preparations, and advertiser deliverables, escalating blockers to the Manager, Mobile Advertising when intervention is required.
	Ensure strict adherence to internal Mobile Advertising processes and methodologies, including proposal standards, pricing guidelines, campaign planning frameworks, and reporting documentation.
	Oversee the quality of internal work output such as proposals, campaign plans, performance summaries, sales insights, and advertising documentation.
	Implement internal analysis procedures to identify performance gaps, revenue risks, or inventory inefficiencies, and relate them to sales objectives and campaign goals.
	Review internal workflows and data validation steps to ensure sales teams receive accurate, timely, and relevant insights for decision?making.
	Manage the preparation and review of sales support materials, ensuring proper documentation of insights, recommendations, and campaign assumptions.
	Develop recommendations to improve sales processes, campaign workflows, pricing efficiency, and commercial alignment across the Mobile Advertising unit.
	Communicate findings, insights, and recommendations through structured reports, dashboards, presentations, or verbal briefings to the Manager and broader Digital Services team.


Requirements
Education:


	First Degree in Social Sciences, Business, Marketing, Mass Comm, Economics, or related fields


Experience:
3 -7 years of work experience which includes:


	3 years+ experience in digital advertising sales is preferred.
	Have an advertising network or book of business that can yield results to the company within a quarter.

Analyst - Digital Advertising Sales Job at MTN Nigeria




        
    

        
        MTN Nigeria - The leader in telecommunications in Nigeria, and a part of a diverse community in Africa and the Middle East, our brand is instantly recognisable. It is through our compelling brand that we are able to attract the right talents who we carefully nurture by continuously improving our employment offerings even beyond reward and recognition.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Analyst - Digital Advertising Sales

Job Identification: 7093
Job Location: Nigeria
Job Schedule: Full time
Job Category: MTN Level 3
Reports To: Manager - Digital Advertising Sales
Division: Digital Services

Mission
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Drive revenue growth for MTN Nigeria’s Mobile Advertising products by providing sales teams with strong analytical, commercial, and proposal driven support. 
	Create campaign solutions, discover new inventory opportunities, supports business development, manage advertiser onboarding, and helps retain and grow advertiser spend.


Description


	Track the progress of sales support activities, campaign preparations, and advertiser deliverables, escalating blockers to the Manager, Mobile Advertising when intervention is required.
	Ensure strict adherence to internal Mobile Advertising processes and methodologies, including proposal standards, pricing guidelines, campaign planning frameworks, and reporting documentation.
	Oversee the quality of internal work output such as proposals, campaign plans, performance summaries, sales insights, and advertising documentation.
	Implement internal analysis procedures to identify performance gaps, revenue risks, or inventory inefficiencies, and relate them to sales objectives and campaign goals.
	Review internal workflows and data validation steps to ensure sales teams receive accurate, timely, and relevant insights for decision?making.
	Manage the preparation and review of sales support materials, ensuring proper documentation of insights, recommendations, and campaign assumptions.
	Develop recommendations to improve sales processes, campaign workflows, pricing efficiency, and commercial alignment across the Mobile Advertising unit.
	Communicate findings, insights, and recommendations through structured reports, dashboards, presentations, or verbal briefings to the Manager and broader Digital Services team.


Requirements
Education:


	First Degree in Social Sciences, Business, Marketing, Mass Comm, Economics, or related fields


Experience:
3 -7 years of work experience which includes:


	3 years+ experience in digital advertising sales is preferred.
	Have an advertising network or book of business that can yield results to the company within a quarter.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "Pastures Hub Nigeria Limited is a duly registered company operating within Nigeria&rsquo;s food distribution and supply sector. We provide structured supply solutions to restaurants, catering companies, hotels, schools, and retail customers, supported by our e-commerce platform and subscription services. We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Supply Chain Support Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary&nbsp;


	The Supply Chain Support Officer provides operational support to the supply chain department, focusing primarily on order fulfillment, stock handling, and dispatch preparation.
	The supply chain support officer ensures that customer orders are purchased, cleaned, packed, and prepared for delivery accurately and efficiently while maintaining proper inventory records.


Key Responsibilities


	Purchase, clean, and pack customer orders accurately according to order requests.
	Assist with receiving, sorting, and storing incoming stock and supplies.
	Prepare and label orders for dispatch and delivery.
	Maintain organised storage areas to ensure easy access to inventory.
	Conduct routine stock checks and report low stock levels or discrepancies.
	Support loading and unloading goods during deliveries.
	Maintain basic records of stock movement and fulfilled orders.
	Ensure the cleanliness and safety of storage areas.


Required Qualifications and Skills


	WAEC / SSCE or OND in any relevant field.
	1&ndash;2 years of experience in supply chain operations, logistics or order fulfilment
	Ability to read and process order lists and delivery notes.
	Good physical stamina and ability to handle stock movement when required.
	Basic computer skills and the ability to use internal inventory or tracking software if necessary.
	Strong attention to detail to ensure accurate order preparation.
	Clear verbal and written communication skills for coordinating with the wider team.


Key Competencies:


	Reliability and punctuality
	Attention to detail
	Teamwork and cooperation
	Organization and efficiency
	Ability to follow instructions accurately.


Benefits / What We Offer


	Competitive salary
	Supportive team environment
	Opportunities to learn and grow within supply chain operations.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@pastures.com.ng&nbsp;using&nbsp;&ldquo;Application &ndash; Supply Chain Support Officer.&rdquo; as the subject of the mail.",

Supply Chain Support Officer Job at Pastures Hub Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Pastures Hub Nigeria Limited is a duly registered company operating within Nigeria’s food distribution and supply sector. We provide structured supply solutions to restaurants, catering companies, hotels, schools, and retail customers, supported by our e-commerce platform and subscription services. Our mission is to empower food businesses with innovative, reliable, and sustainable supply-chain solutions while redefining how fresh produce is sourced and delivered. Guided by technology, trust, and transparency, we are building a food supply ecosystem where quality, freshness, and community come together.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Supply Chain Support Officer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 


	The Supply Chain Support Officer provides operational support to the supply chain department, focusing primarily on order fulfillment, stock handling, and dispatch preparation.
	The supply chain support officer ensures that customer orders are purchased, cleaned, packed, and prepared for delivery accurately and efficiently while maintaining proper inventory records.


Key Responsibilities


	Purchase, clean, and pack customer orders accurately according to order requests.
	Assist with receiving, sorting, and storing incoming stock and supplies.
	Prepare and label orders for dispatch and delivery.
	Maintain organised storage areas to ensure easy access to inventory.
	Conduct routine stock checks and report low stock levels or discrepancies.
	Support loading and unloading goods during deliveries.
	Maintain basic records of stock movement and fulfilled orders.
	Ensure the cleanliness and safety of storage areas.


Required Qualifications and Skills


	WAEC / SSCE or OND in any relevant field.
	1–2 years of experience in supply chain operations, logistics or order fulfilment
	Ability to read and process order lists and delivery notes.
	Good physical stamina and ability to handle stock movement when required.
	Basic computer skills and the ability to use internal inventory or tracking software if necessary.
	Strong attention to detail to ensure accurate order preparation.
	Clear verbal and written communication skills for coordinating with the wider team.


Key Competencies:


	Reliability and punctuality
	Attention to detail
	Teamwork and cooperation
	Organization and efficiency
	Ability to follow instructions accurately.


Benefits / What We Offer


	Competitive salary
	Supportive team environment
	Opportunities to learn and grow within supply chain operations.


Method of Application 
Interested candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Application – Supply Chain Support Officer.” as the subject of the mail.
